headings.text: Professional Clear Aligners at AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry, Bellevue, WA
Benefits of Choosing Clear Aligners Over Braces
Who Is the Right Candidate for Clear Aligner Treatment
Process of Getting Fitted for Clear Aligners
How to Care for and Maintain Your Clear Aligners

paragraphs: If your teeth are crooked, crowded, or have unwanted gaps, it can affect more than just your smile's appearance. Misalignment can lead to an improper bite, causing uneven chewing and potentially leading to faster tooth wear.

At AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry, we offer clear aligners as a modern solution to gently and effectively guide your teeth into their correct position, helping to prevent these issues from worsening.

Clear aligners are custom-made, transparent plastic trays that fit snugly over your teeth. The treatment works through a carefully planned series of these trays. Each aligner is designed to apply gentle, consistent pressure to specific teeth, gradually shifting them into their ideal position over time.

You will typically wear each new set of aligners for one to two weeks before moving to the next one in the series. For the treatment to be effective, the aligners must be worn for 20 to 22 hours per day. Because the trays are removable, you can take them out to eat, drink, brush, and floss as you usually would. This slow, controlled movement ensures the process is safe and helps minimize discomfort as your teeth are guided into proper alignment.
Many patients prefer clear aligners over traditional braces because they are designed to fit seamlessly into an active lifestyle. The primary advantages include:

Clear aligners are an excellent treatment option for many people, but they are most effective for correcting mild to moderate alignment issues. This includes teeth that are slightly crooked, crowded, or have small gaps. Clear aligners can also address some bite problems, such as certain types of overbites or underbites.

Success with clear aligners depends heavily on patient compliance. Because they are removable, it is essential to wear them for the recommended 20 to 22 hours daily. If the aligners are not worn as directed, the teeth may not move according to the treatment plan. For this reason, teens and adults are often ideal candidates. In cases of more complex bite or alignment problems, traditional braces may be a more suitable option.
During your consultation at AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry, we will perform a thorough examination, including scans and X-rays, to determine if clear aligners are the right choice for you.
Getting clear aligners happens in clear steps to protect your teeth while they move. Here's what usually happens:
The entire treatment timeline can vary, but it typically takes several months, depending on your specific needs.
Proper care is essential for keeping your aligners clean and ensuring your treatment stays on track.
Clara H. Song, DDS

Dr. Clara Song is the founder of AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry. She earned her Doctor of Dental Surgery degree from Loma Linda University and pursued advanced training at the Las Vegas Institute for Advanced Dental Studies, a world-renowned institution for cosmetic dentistry. Dr. Song is committed to providing gentle and compassionate dental care for families in the Bellevue and Kirkland communities.

Dr. Eric Kim, a Pacific Northwest native, is the newest member of our dental team. He earned his DDS from Loma Linda University after studying General Biology at the University of Washington. Dr. Kim is passionate about staying current with the latest dental advancements to provide the best possible care for his patients.

At AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry, we want dental care to be easy and affordable. We accept various payment methods including cash, check, credit cards, and financing options. Our office works with numerous insurance providers. Please call us to verify if we accept your specific plan. If your treatment is not fully covered, we can help you explore payment solutions to ensure you receive the care you need.
Schedule Your Consultation Today
Take the first step toward a straighter, healthier smile. Contact AnaBella Family and Cosmetic Dentistry today to schedule your clear aligner consultation.
